evals.expected_output: Agent reads SKILL.md, validates config, clones repo at exact commit from lockfile, runs npx skills add, does NOT modify lockfile
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent clones the repo at the exact commit hash from the lockfile
Agent runs npx skills@1.4.5 add with --agent flag
Agent does NOT modify skills-lock.yaml
Agent cleans up temporary clone directory

evals.expected_output: Agent installs all 3 repos from lockfile at their exact commits, does not modify lockfile
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent installs all 3 repositories
Each repo is cloned at its exact commit hash from the lockfile
Agent does NOT modify skills-lock.yaml

evals.expected_output: First-time install: no lockfile present, agent installs latest from branch and generates lockfile
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent detects that no lockfile exists
Agent treats this as a first-time install
Agent installs the latest version from the branch
Agent generates skills-lock.yaml with commit hash and timestamp

evals.expected_output: First-time install with 3 repos: generates lockfile with 3 entries
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent detects no lockfile, treats as first-time install
Agent installs all 3 repositories
Agent generates skills-lock.yaml with 3 entries
Each entry has repo, branch, commit, installed timestamp, and skills list

evals.expected_output: Agent installs existing repo from lockfile commit + installs new repo at latest, adds new entry to lockfile
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent installs superpowers at the exact commit from lockfile
Agent detects anthropic-skills is new (not in lockfile)
Agent installs anthropic-skills at latest from branch
Agent adds anthropic-skills entry to lockfile
Agent does NOT modify the existing superpowers lockfile entry

evals.expected_output: Validation fails on malformed skills.yaml, agent stops immediately and does not install anything
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Validation fails with a schema error
Agent stops immediately — hard gate
Agent does NOT attempt to clone or install
Agent reports the exact error to the user

evals.expected_output: Git clone fails because repository does not exist, agent reports error and stops
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent attempts to clone the repository
Clone fails because the repo does not exist
Agent reports the error to the user
Agent does NOT generate a lockfile entry for the failed repo

evals.expected_output: Git checkout fails because commit hash does not exist in repo, agent reports error
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent clones the repository
Agent attempts to checkout the commit hash from lockfile
Checkout fails because commit does not exist
Agent reports the error to the user and stops

evals.expected_output: npx skills add fails, agent reports error and stops
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent clones and checks out successfully
If npx skills@1.4.5 add fails, agent reports the error
Agent does NOT silently ignore the failure

evals.expected_output: Lockfile has an entry (removed-repo) that is not in skills.yaml. Agent behavior for orphaned lockfile entries is undefined — this eval documents what happens
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent installs superpowers (present in both files)
Agent handles the extra lockfile entry (removed-repo) — either ignores it, warns about it, or asks the user

evals.expected_output: Same repository referenced with two different branches. Agent should handle this without conflict
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent treats each entry as independent
Agent installs from both branches without conflict
Each branch gets its own lockfile entry

evals.expected_output: Everything is already installed at the correct commit. Install should be idempotent — reinstalls cleanly
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent clones and installs at the lockfile commit
Installation completes without error
Lockfile is NOT modified
Result is identical to a fresh install

evals.expected_output: First repo installs successfully but second repo fails (doesn't exist). Partial failure behavior is undefined — this eval documents what happens
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent installs the first repo (superpowers) successfully
Agent fails on the second repo (fake-repo)
Agent reports the failure to the user
Agent handles lockfile state consistently — either writes only the successful entry or writes nothing

evals.expected_output: Private/inaccessible repo fails to clone, agent reports authentication or access error
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user which agent to install for
Agent attempts to clone the repository
Clone fails due to access/authentication error
Agent reports the error to the user

evals.expected_output: skills.yaml is empty, validation fails, agent stops
expectations: Agent runs validation
Validation fails because skills.yaml is empty
Agent stops immediately — hard gate
Agent does NOT attempt to install anything

evals.expected_output: Agent removes the skill and deletes its lockfile entry
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Agent runs npx skills@1.4.5 remove superpowers --all
Agent removes the superpowers entry from skills-lock.yaml
Agent confirms removal to the user

evals.expected_output: Agent removes only superpowers from a multi-repo lockfile, other entries stay intact
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Agent runs npx skills@1.4.5 remove superpowers --all
Agent removes only the superpowers entry from skills-lock.yaml
Other lockfile entries (anthropic-skills, skillfile) remain intact

evals.expected_output: Agent reports that the skill is not found in the lockfile
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Agent checks the lockfile for nonexistent-skill
Agent reports that the skill was not found
Agent does NOT modify skills-lock.yaml

evals.expected_output: No lockfile exists, agent reports error
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Agent detects no lockfile exists
Agent reports that there is nothing to remove
Agent does NOT create a lockfile

evals.expected_output: Validation fails on bad skills.yaml, agent stops before removing
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Validation fails with a schema error
Agent stops immediately — hard gate
Agent does NOT attempt to remove anything

evals.expected_output: Agent asks for confirmation, updates to latest commit, regenerates lockfile
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Agent asks the user for confirmation before proceeding
Agent clones at the branch (not the lockfile commit)
Agent runs npx skills@1.4.5 add with the cloned path and --agent flag
Agent regenerates skills-lock.yaml with new commit hash and timestamp

evals.expected_output: Agent updates all 3 repos and regenerates lockfile with 3 entries
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Agent asks the user for confirmation before proceeding
Agent updates all 3 repositories
Agent regenerates skills-lock.yaml with 3 updated entries

evals.expected_output: Agent asks for confirmation, user declines, nothing is modified
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Agent asks the user for confirmation
If user declines, agent stops without modifying anything
Lockfile is NOT modified

evals.expected_output: Validation fails, agent stops before updating
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Validation fails with a schema error
Agent stops immediately — hard gate
Agent does NOT attempt to update anything

evals.expected_output: Clone fails during update, agent reports error
expectations: Agent runs validation (passes)
Agent asks the user for confirmation
Agent attempts to clone the repository
Clone fails, agent reports the error to the user

evals.expected_output: No lockfile exists, agent creates one from scratch (equivalent to first-time install)
expectations: Agent runs validation before operating
Agent asks the user for confirmation
Agent clones at the branch and installs
Agent generates skills-lock.yaml with commit hash and timestamp

evals.expected_output: Agent filters skills.yaml to only entries with claude-code in their agents list, installs only those
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent uses the specified agent (claude-code) without asking
Agent filters repos to only those with claude-code in agents list
Agent installs matching repos using --agent claude-code flag

evals.prompt: Install my skills for all agents
evals.expected_output: Agent installs everything without filtering
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent uses 'all' — installs without agent filtering
Agent installs all repos regardless of agents list

evals.expected_output: Only repos with antigravity in agents list are installed. Repos without antigravity are skipped.
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent filters repos to only those with antigravity in agents list
Only skillfile repo is installed (only one with antigravity)
superpowers and anthropic-skills are skipped

evals.expected_output: No repos match the specified agent, agent reports that nothing to install
expectations: Agent runs validation before install
Agent filters repos to those with nonexistent-agent in agents list
No repos match
Agent reports that no skills are configured for this agent
